title: Basit Menu Sistemi
subtitle: Fonksiyonlar ile menu tabanli akis ornegi.
code:
<?php

$todoList = [];

function showMenu(): void {
    echo "\n=== YAPILACAKLAR LISTESI ===\n";
    echo "1. Gorev Ekle\n";
    echo "2. Gorevleri Listele\n";
    echo "3. Gorev Sil\n";
    echo "4. Cikis\n";
}

function addTask(array &$list, string $task): void {
    $list[] = $task;
    echo "Eklendi: '" . $task . "'\n";
}

function listTasks(array $list): void {
    if (empty($list)) {
        echo "Liste bos.\n";
        return;
    }

    foreach ($list as $index => $task) {
        echo ($index + 1) . ". " . $task . "\n";
    }
}

function removeTask(array &$list, int $index): void {
    if ($index >= 0 && $index < count($list)) {
        echo "Silindi: '" . $list[$index] . "'\n";
        array_splice($list, $index, 1);
    } else {
        echo "Gecersiz numara.\n";
    }
}

showMenu();

echo "\n> Secim: 1\n";
addTask($todoList, "Markete git");

echo "\n> Secim: 1\n";
addTask($todoList, "Kod yaz");

echo "\n> Secim: 1\n";
addTask($todoList, "Spor yap");

echo "\n> Secim: 2\n";
listTasks($todoList);

echo "\n> Secim: 3 (1. gorevi sil)\n";
removeTask($todoList, 0);

echo "\n> Secim: 2\n";
listTasks($todoList);

echo "\n> Secim: 4\n";
echo "Programdan cikiliyor...\n";

?>
